name: node-regenerate-unicode-properties
title: node-regenerate-unicode-properties
summary: Unicode properties and values as Regenerate sets for Node.js
description:
Unicode properties and values as Regenerate sets for Node.js
This package provides Unicode properties and values as Regenerate sets,
that is regular expressions ready to use by the Regenerate regex generator.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-regenerate-unicode-properties because Unicode properties and values as Regenerate sets for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-regenerate-unicode-properties as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-regenerate-unicode-properties with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-regenerate-unicode-properties --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
